rules.rule: Review changes for public API compatibility, tool schema drift, async/sync boundary mistakes, exception swallowing that hides failures, and missing regression tests. Pay special attention to RAG, memory, MCP, and LLM provider behavior.
Review self-host product code for tenant/workspace isolation, unsafe file path handling, secret leakage, missing input validation, missing job-state transitions, and incomplete error reporting.
Check database migrations for reversible behavior, data-loss risk, missing indexes, foreign-key integrity, and compatibility with self-host upgrades.
Check self-host deployment files for secret defaults, persistent volumes, health checks, least-privilege configuration, and clear local development defaults.
Check whether tests cover the changed behavior instead of only implementation details. Flag brittle mocks, missing failure cases, and missing regression coverage.
